summary: TOOL-CONTEXT Phase 0 has 2 blocking gaps: silent fallback on modeDescriptions miss (Debuggability 2/5) and untestable pipeline (Testability 2/5)
detail:
Critic review of plan tool-context-phase-0-mode-descriptions.v1.json found 2 blocking conditions:
1. describeTool() silently returns undefined when variants[agent.name] is undefined — no log warning, no span attribute. A typo like 'architecht' silently degrades to static description.
2. tools() lives inside Layer.effect requiring 80+ services — no isolation path exists. The proposed mode-descriptions.test.ts is aspirational without extracting describeTool logic into a separately testable pure function.
Both must be resolved before execution wave.
